englishDefinitions: A famous fictional collie dog known for rescuing people, especially from American films and television.
A Scottish or Irish word meaning a girl or young woman.
persianTranslation: دختر یا زن جوان در گویش اسکاتلندی یا ایرلندی
examples: The dog was so smart that everyone joked she was like Lassie.
Lassie became one of the most famous dogs in television history.
In Scotland, a lassie can mean a young girl.
